feat.name: Advanced Mysteries
feat.text: You gain one oracle feat. For meeting its prerequisites, your oracle level is equal to half your level.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.special: You can select this feat more than once. Each time, you gain another oracle feat.
